description: Apply an evaluation lens to upstream output — the lens reveals what the output can't see about itself, and the revelation IS the revision
usage: improve this, look at this differently, what am I missing, perspective, apply a lens, what is this not seeing, blind spots, second look, reexamine

target.description: The deliverable or analysis to examine through a lens

lens.description: Which evaluation lens to apply: missed-implications, wrong-framing, hidden-assumptions, strategic-avoidance, operational-gap, steelman-then-gap, changed-context, or auto (module selects based on what it sees). Also accepts custom lens text or a workspace lens filename.
